iotevents.alarmmodel.simplerule.CfnAbout: A rule that compares an input property value to a threshold value with a comparison operator.

iotevents.alarmmodel.simplerule.Comparis.Allowed values: EQUAL | GREATER | GREATER_OR_EQUAL | LESS | LESS_OR_EQUAL | NOT_EQUAL

iotevents.alarmmodel.simplerule.InputPro.Description: The value on the left side of the comparison operator. You can specify an AWS IoT Events input attribute as an input property.

iotevents.alarmmodel.simplerule.Threshol.Description: The value on the right side of the comparison operator. You can enter a number or specify an AWS IoT Events input attribute.
